Tier List Stands Styles Subs Skins Codes Guides
← All Styles

Kendo

Excellent range and counter-attacks. Synergizes with fast or sword-based Stands. Provides a mid-range option for players who want reach without sacrificing damage.

6/10Combo Potential
7/10Damage Scaling
MidRange

Moves

B

Quick Draw

A fast unsheathing slash with good range.

N

Counter Slash

Parry an incoming attack and counter with a heavy slash.

M

Multislash

A series of rapid slashes hitting multiple times.

✅ Pros

  • Superior range compared to Boxing
  • Counter Slash punishes aggressive players
  • Great synergy with blade-based Stands
  • Solid neutral game in PvP

❌ Cons

  • Lower combo potential than Boxing
  • Counter requires precise timing
  • Less burst damage in short windows

Best Stands to Pair With

B Anubis S Made in Heaven A C-Moon A Weather Report

How to Unlock

Talk to the Kendo Master at Bus Stop 7 (Dojo). Costs $7,500.
